# ADR-0006: Stale early

## Status

Accepted — 2026-01-10 — supersedes ADR-0007

## Context

An earlier, Accepted ADR claiming to supersede a later ADR (0007) that is also still Accepted and was never updated. Seeded violation: Accepted ADR superseding a later Accepted ADR without status change (D2), together with `0007-stale-late.md`.
